"'''Fingers'''" was the nick-name attributed to a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] animal herder. She specialized in training [[Borgle bat]]s for arena pit-fighting competition. She hunted the dangerous creatures in their native jungle environment on the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. On one occasion, a Borgle bat bit off two of the fingers on her right hand, earning the Zabrak the uncomplimentary nickname, ''Fingers''.

==Appearances==
